candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; appears as the primary sales/revenue row.
Also a direct revenue label, but appears to duplicate Revenue exactly and is more subtotal-like.
Not operating revenue; financial income.
Pretax profit, not revenue.
Below-the-line discontinued item, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income-related measure, not revenue.

candidates.why: Net income-related measure, not revenue.
Liability balance, not income statement revenue.
Equity movement item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as a priority list, not a sum; Revenue is preferred and Total Revenue is a duplicate fallback label.

candidates.why: Inventory-related balance sheet asset, not cost of goods sold expense.

variables.notes: No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales row is presented on the provided income statement. Do not substitute broad Operating expenses or inventory asset rows for COGS.

candidates.why: Broad operating expense bucket that likely includes non-SG&A items and potentially COGS; less preferred than a clear overhead component.
Clear overhead/SG&A component and preferred component row.
Dedicated R&D row exists, but it appears below operating income in this preview ordering, so it should not be included in SG&A here.

variables.notes: Selected the clear overhead component. Excluded Operating expenses because it is too broad and may include non-SG&A items. Excluded Research and Development Expenses from XSGA_COMPONENTS because it appears below operating income in the statement ordering.

candidates.why: Explicit dedicated R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below operating income in the preview ordering, so it is mapped to XRD but not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best match for recurring financing/interest costs.
Earnings attribution item, not interest expense.
Earnings attribution item, not interest expense.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Could relate to interest, but no visible values and appears in supplemental debt disclosure; Finance costs is the primary recurring P&L finance line.

variables.notes: Selected the recurring finance-cost line and excluded non-interest items and balance sheet rows.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution line, not book equity.
Associate income/equity-method related line, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent equity is available.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.
Balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution item, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution item, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI line.
